market_pulse: Memorial Day Weekend surge with heavy talent bookings across tier-1 venues; LIV Beach competing directly with David Guetta weekend, while Zouk and OMNIA activate premium EDM lineups (Meduza, Tiësto, Steve Aoki).

content_gaps.description: David Guetta, Tiësto, and Steve Aoki anchoring weekend lineups at competitors; Zouk/OMNIA positioning as premium EDM destinations with sustained artist presence.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Secure multi-night residency anchors for late June/July; emphasize LIV's venue scale and production capacity vs. competing properties.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using countdown posts and behind-the-scenes stories for event anticipation; limited storytelling cadence detected across LIV social channels.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch story countdown series 48h before major LIV events; include staff BTS, guest DJ arrivals, setup/production moments.

content_gaps.description: Beach club properties leveraging local VIP promoters and lifestyle creators; XS and Encore featuring high-follower ambassadors in feed content.
